chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-108 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A.No.737/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.738/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 31.01.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Abbasi, Advocate for applicant along-with applicant. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption application is allowed subject to all exceptions. 4. Through instant Criminal Bail Application, Applicant Abdul Majeed Soomro son of Juman Soomro, seeks protective bail in FIR No.02 of 2024 registered at PS Dadu, for offence under sections 409, 465, 467, 468, 471, 477-A, 34 PPC r/w Section 5 Act-II, 1947. It is inter alia contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant intends to surrender before the concerned Court for appropriate relief but he apprehends his imminent arrest as the premises of the Trial Court has been cordoned off by the police, therefore, he prays that the applicant may be admitted to protective bail and NBWs issued against may be suspended. Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case, applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days from today subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, NBWs issued against the Applicant shall remain suspended. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days from today or on the date the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court whichever occurs earlier; in case of failure, the bail bond executed by the applicant shall stand forfeited automatically.

In the meanwhile, NBWs issued against the Applicant shall remain suspended. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days from today or on the date the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court whichever occurs earlier; in case of failure, the bail bond executed by the applicant shall stand forfeited automatically. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE
